_meta.source: UK ONS — Annual Survey of Hours and Earnings (ASHE) 2024, Table 14 Extended
_meta.methodology: ONS ASHE 2024 Table 14 — earnings by occupation (SOC 2020 4-digit codes). Extended role coverage beyond software developers: data scientists/ML engineers (SOC 2136 proxy), marketing managers (SOC 1134/2422), sales managers (SOC 1135), HR managers (SOC 1136/2424), finance analysts (SOC 2421), designers (SOC 2137/3421), operations managers (SOC 1162), DevOps (SOC 2136 proxy), QA engineers (SOC 3131). London regional data from ONS ASHE London regional tables. Figures represent gross annual pay for full-time employees.
_meta.coverage: UK national and London regional for expanded role set. Government statistical survey — covers enterprises of all sizes, all sectors. Most representative UK earnings source.
_meta.limitations: SOC codes map many roles to broad groups (e.g. SOC 2136 covers software engineers, DevOps, and some data scientists). London regional data has smaller sample sizes for less common roles. Seniority inferred from earnings percentiles — not directly from job level.
_meta.currency_note: All figures in GBP gross annual.

records._ref: ONS ASHE 2024, SOC 2136 — DevOps / Platform Engineers, UK national, junior
records.notes: SOC 2136 covers DevOps engineers alongside software developers. Junior proxy from P25 earnings band. ONS ASHE 2024.

records._ref: ONS ASHE 2024, SOC 2136 — DevOps / Platform Engineers, UK national, mid
records.notes: SOC 2136 median — covers DevOps, SRE, platform engineering at all levels. ONS ASHE 2024 national median.

records._ref: ONS ASHE 2024, SOC 2136 — DevOps / Platform Engineers, London, mid
records.notes: London DevOps / platform engineers from ONS ASHE 2024 regional tables. London premium vs national: ~25%.

records._ref: ONS ASHE 2024, SOC 2425 — Data Scientists / ML Engineers, UK national, mid
records.notes: SOC 2425 covers data analysts and data scientists. Used for both data-analyst and data-scientist role mapping. ONS ASHE 2024.

records._ref: ONS ASHE 2024, SOC 2425 — Data Scientists, London, mid
records.notes: London data analysts/scientists from ONS ASHE 2024 regional tables. Strong signal from fintech (Monzo, Wise, Starling), tech (DeepMind, Palantir), and consulting sectors.

records._ref: ONS ASHE 2024, SOC 1134 — Marketing Managers, UK national, mid
records.notes: SOC 1134 — marketing and advertising directors/managers. Maps to marketing-manager, head of marketing. ONS ASHE 2024. Broad range due to company size and sector variation.

records._ref: ONS ASHE 2024, SOC 1134 — Marketing Managers, London, mid
records.notes: London marketing managers from ONS ASHE 2024 regional tables. Strong agency, FMCG, tech employer base inflates London premium.

records._ref: ONS ASHE 2024, SOC 1135 — Sales Managers, UK national, mid
records.notes: SOC 1135 sales directors and managers. Maps to sales-manager. Base salary only — total comp for sales roles typically includes significant commission/bonus not captured here.

records._ref: ONS ASHE 2024, SOC 1136 — HR Managers, UK national, mid
records.notes: SOC 1136 HR managers and directors. Maps to hr-manager. Median reflects mid-level HRBP / people manager. ONS ASHE 2024.

records._ref: ONS ASHE 2024, SOC 2421 — Finance Analysts, UK national, mid
records.notes: SOC 2421 chartered accountants and finance professionals. Maps to finance-analyst. Broad sector mix — financial services and Big Four at upper end. ONS ASHE 2024.

records._ref: ONS ASHE 2024, SOC 2421 — Finance Analysts, London, mid
records.notes: London finance analysts. Concentration of financial services (Goldman, HSBC, Barclays, JP Morgan) significantly inflates the London premium for finance roles.

records._ref: ONS ASHE 2024, SOC 2137 — UX/UI Designers, UK national, mid
records.notes: SOC 2137 web design and development professionals. Maps to designer (UX/UI/product design). Tech-focused product designers at scale-ups tend toward upper end. ONS ASHE 2024.

records._ref: ONS ASHE 2024, SOC 2137 — UX/UI Designers, London, mid
records.notes: London UX/UI designers from ONS ASHE regional tables. Strong fintech, gaming, and agency presence. Product designers at top tech companies above this range.

records._ref: ONS ASHE 2024, SOC 1162 — Operations Managers, UK national, mid
records.role_raw: Business and financial project management professionals
records.notes: SOC 1162 operations managers. Maps to operations-manager. Wide range across sectors — tech ops managers tend toward upper end. ONS ASHE 2024.

records._ref: ONS ASHE 2024, SOC 3131 — QA Engineers, UK national, mid
records.notes: SOC 3131 — closest ONS code to QA/test engineers. IT operations technicians includes test and QA. Lower than software developer median. ONS ASHE 2024.

records._ref: ONS ASHE 2024, SOC 2422 — Marketing Associates / Growth, UK national, mid
records.notes: SOC 2422 marketing associate professionals. Maps to growth-manager, performance-marketing-manager, content-manager, social-media-manager at mid level. ONS ASHE 2024.

records._ref: ONS ASHE 2024, SOC 2133 — IT Project Managers, London, senior
records.notes: Senior product managers / IT programme managers London. ONS ASHE 2024 P75 band. Represents experienced PMs at tech-forward employers.
